description:
Experiment: First, install dependencies using "pip install -e .". Then, train a Resnet18 student model using CLIP ViT-L/14 model as teacher with L-cls and L-mse loss enabled on CaltechBirds dataset
Parameters:
- dataset directory: dataset/cub
- train batch: 128
- test batch: 64
- 90 epochs
- 0.05 learning rate
Return: evaluation performance for in-distribution dataset
refsol:
pip install -e .
python main_experiments.py -d datasets/cub -a resnet18 --label-path datasets/cub/label2text.txt --repeat-epochs 5 --epochs 90 --lr 0.05 --schedule 30 60 --gamma 0.1 --train-batch 128 --test-batch 64 --use-clip --clip-model ViT-L/14 --clip-align-image-classification=1 --clip-align-image-mse

description:
Experiment: First, install dependencies using "pip install -e .". Then, train a Resnet18 student model using CLIP ViT-L/14 model as teacher with L-cls, L-cst, and L-mse loss enabled on CaltechBirds dataset
Parameters:
- dataset directory: dataset/cub
- train batch: 128
- test batch: 64
- 90 epochs
- 0.05 learning rate
- 5 shot
Return: evaluation performance for out-of-distribution dataset
refsol:
pip install -e .
python main_experiments.py -d datasets/cub -a resnet18 \ 
--label-path datasets/cub/label2text.txt --repeat-epochs 5 \
--epochs 20 --lr 0.001 --onecyclelr --gamma 0.1 \
--train-batch 128 --test-batch 64 \
--use-clip --clip-model ViT-L/14 \
--clip-align-image-classification=1 \
--clip-align-image-mse \
--clip-align-image-contrastive \
--few-shot-num 5 --few-shot-method finetune

description:
Experiment: First, install dependencies using "pip install -e .". Then, train a Resnet18 student model using CLIP ViT-L/14 model as teacher with L-cls, L-cst, L-mse, and L-vlalign (with k=256) loss enabled on Flower102 dataset
Parameters:
- dataset directory: dataset/flowers
- train batch: 128
- test batch: 64
- 90 epochs
- 0.05 learning rate
- one shot, out-of-distribution
Return: evaluation performance for out-of-distribution dataset
refsol:
pip install -e .
python main_experiments.py -d datasets/flowers -a resnet18 \ 
--label-path datasets/cub/label2text.txt --repeat-epochs 5 \
--epochs 90 --lr 0.05 --schedule 30 60 --gamma 0.1 \
--train-batch 128 --test-batch 64 \
--use-clip --clip-model ViT-L/14 \
--clip-align-image-classification=1 \
--clip-align-image-mse \
--clip-align-image-contrastive \
--clip-align-proximal-text-num=256
